message:
docs: start gpt-5.4 medium eval on mini failures (58 tasks × 3 reps)

Serf commit a6a5589, gpt-5.4, reasoning_effort=medium.
Testing whether the full model solves what mini couldn't.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Eval: gpt-5.4 medium — mini failures only
+
+**Date:** March 23, 2026
+**Model:** gpt-5.4, reasoning_effort=medium
+**Serf commit:** a6a5589
+**Benchmark:** terminal-bench 2.0
+**Scope:** 58 tasks that gpt-5.4-mini failed to pass 3/3, × 3 reps
+
+## Purpose
+
+Test whether the full gpt-5.4 model at medium reasoning effort can solve tasks
+that gpt-5.4-mini couldn't reliably handle. This establishes a performance
+ceiling for these tasks before we invest in further tuning.
+
+## Status
+
+Running. Results will be added as they come in.
